name: Kris Dreemurr
description:
Kris. But stuck in a wall.

───── ◉ ─────

Kris. Wall. Hole. Did they think it's a shortcut? Maybe. Maybe not. Who knows.

this art...... oh this ART..... made me think of making this bot.

I have another version of THIS ART but with a Dark World Kris. Idk if I should make a second bot with a different scenario. I probably will.

They're, obviously, aged-up here. The school isn't the in-game school. It's bigger because I said so.

I didn't include any information about the SOUL controlling Kris, so... Let me know if you want me to add it. Tho I'm a bit scared that it'll fuck up the bot.

Also... apparently, JanitorLLM (idk about openai, claude and proxies) doesn't really understand the "being-stuck-in-a-hole-with-only-lower-half-out" thing. Sometimes it might get confused, but don't worry, you have the power of re-rolling.
creator: disasterine
